name: clawd-app
description: Claw'd App - All-in-one desktop app: clawd-chat server + UI + worker manager

scripts.dev:electron: bun run build:electron && NODE_ENV=development electron dist/electron/main.js
scripts.build:ui: cd packages/ui && bun install && bun run build
scripts.build:server: mkdir -p dist/server && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun --outfile dist/server/clawd-app && rm -rf dist/server/ui && cp -r packages/ui/dist dist/server/ui
scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun run build:server && bun run build:electron
scripts.build:linux: bun run build:ui && mkdir -p dist/server && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/server/clawd-app && rm -rf dist/server/ui && cp -r packages/ui/dist dist/server/ui && bun run build:electron
scripts.build:macos: bun run build:ui && mkdir -p dist/server && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/server/clawd-app && rm -rf dist/server/ui && cp -r packages/ui/dist dist/server/ui && bun run build:electron
scripts.install:local: mkdir -p ~/.clawd/bin && cp dist/server/clawd-app ~/.clawd/bin/ && rm -rf ~/.clawd/bin/app-ui && cp -r dist/server/ui ~/.clawd/bin/app-ui
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist release node_modules packages/ui/node_modules packages/ui/dist
